03 The High Output Team Canvas - YouTube.mp4
The tool we're gonna leverage to define and design your high output team is the cleverly named High Output Team Canvas. Now, don't let the simplicity of this tool fool you. Not only will it isolate and address many of your existing team challenges, it's also gonna give you a sequence and framework for how and when to make additional hires and organize and reorganize your business as it scales. Now, trust me on this, whether you're a team of one or a team of 1,000, this is a powerful tool So if you haven't already done so, make sure you access your copy of the High Output Team Canvas because you're gonna need it for the next few steps. Also, you'll wanna gather all your documented value engines prior to moving on to the next lesson. Whether you print them out or just open them on your screen, just make sure they're readily accessible because these are gonna serve as the foundation for assigning clear areas of accountability. Okay, once you have accessed the High Output Team Canvas and gathered all your value engines in one place, you're ready to start designing your High Output Team. Let's get started.
